bead.title: availability: cached providerModels(name, kind) query + refreshProviderModels mutation
bead.description: Add GraphQL query providerModels(name, kind) returning model identifiers per provider, with a server-side cache (60s TTL by default). Add refreshProviderModels mutation (auth-gated, in-flight guarded, sanitized baseURL). Use a separate cached query rather than bolting onto the 2.5s-polled provider table — fizeau.ListModels does live discovery and would hammer providers.
bead.acceptance: 1. providerModels query in GraphQL schema. 2. 60s cache; manual refresh via mutation. 3. baseURL sanitized for ts-net safety. 4. In-flight guard prevents duplicate concurrent fetches. 5. Auth: requireTrusted gate.
